nop.name: No Operation
nop.description: Perform no operation for one clock cycle.

mov.name: Move
mov.description: Move data into the specified register.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: The target register of the data

arguments.name: data
arguments.description: The data to move into the register

add.name: Add
add.description: Perform an addition operation on the specified register.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: The target register to perform the arithmetic on

arguments.name: incr
arguments.description: The amount to increment the register by

inc.name: Increment
inc.description: Increment the specified register by one.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: The target register to perform the arithmetic on

sub.name: Subtract
sub.description: Perform a subtraction operation on the specified register.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: The target register to perform the arithmetic on

arguments.name: incr
arguments.description: The amount to decrement the register by

mul.name: Multiply
mul.description: Perform a multiplication operation on the specified register.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: The target register to perform the arithmetic on

arguments.name: incr
arguments.description: The amount to multiply the register by

div.name: Divide
div.description: Perform a division operation on the specified register.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: The target register to perform the arithmetic on

arguments.name: incr
arguments.description: The amount to divide the register by

imul.name: Multiply (signed)
imul.description: Perform a signed multiplication operation on the specified register.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: The target register to perform the arithmetic on

arguments.name: incr
arguments.description: The amount to multiply the register by

idiv.name: Divide (signed)
idiv.description: Perform a signed divison operation on the specified register.

arguments.name: reg
arguments.description: The target register to perform the arithmetic on

arguments.name: incr
arguments.description: The amount to divide the register by
